message:
fix: improve accessibility and code quality in web UI pages

Accessibility and cleanup across Pipelines, Setup, and Velocity pages:

- Replace clickable div with semantic button element in PipelineCard
  header for proper keyboard accessibility (Pipelines.tsx)
- Remove unused index parameter from ToolCard component props and all
  call sites (Setup.tsx)
- Replace array-index React keys with stable content-derived keys in
  RecommendationsPanel and StageCard metrics (Setup.tsx, Velocity.tsx)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
